articles.title: Asia-Pacific Governments Agree on New Plan to Fight Climate Change and Pollution
articles.summary: Leaders from countries across Asia and the Pacific have come together to agree on a major new environmental plan. Meeting under the United Nations, they signed a declaration and a five-year action programme running from 2026 to 2030. The plan aims to tackle climate change, the loss of wildlife, and pollution all at the same time, instead of dealing with each problem separately. Scientists warn that nine out of ten people in the region breathe air that is unsafe. The agreement recognises that environmental problems are all connected, so countries need to work as a team to solve them before 2030 targets are missed.

lv1: What did the Asia-Pacific governments agree to do at the UN meeting? (亞太地區政府在聯合國會議上同意做什麼？)
Name two environmental problems mentioned in the agreement. (請說出協議中提及的兩個環境問題。)
lv2: Why do you think countries decided to work together on environmental problems instead of each country acting alone? (你認為各國為何決定合作解決環境問題，而非各自行動？)
What does it mean that 90% of people in Asia-Pacific breathe unsafe air? Why is this a serious concern? (亞太地區九成人口呼吸不潔淨空氣代表什麼？為何這是嚴重問題？)
lv3: Some people argue that economic development is more important than environmental protection for poorer countries in Asia. Do you agree or disagree? Give reasons. (有人認為對亞洲較貧窮的國家而言，經濟發展比環境保護更重要。你同意嗎？請說明理由。)

If 88% of environment-related goals are likely to be missed by 2030, does that mean the goals were unrealistic, or that governments have not done enough? Who should be responsible? (若88%的環境目標在2030年前可能無法達成，是因為目標不切實際，還是政府行動不足？誰應該負責？)

articles.title: Microsoft Helps Build Giant Undersea Internet Cable to Connect Asia
articles.summary: Technology giant Microsoft is joining forces with a Singapore company called Lightstorm and other partners to build a massive underwater internet cable. Named I-2SEA, the cable will stretch 3,600 kilometres under the ocean, linking India with Malaysia and Singapore. It is expected to be ready by late 2029. The project is being driven by the huge demand for artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and data services across Asia. Experts say that as AI grows, tech companies need to control not just computers and software, but also the physical cables that carry information beneath the sea.

lv1: Which three countries will the new undersea cable connect? (新的海底電纜將連接哪三個國家？)
When is the undersea cable expected to be ready to use? (這條海底電纜預計何時可以使用？)
lv2: Why do you think the growth of artificial intelligence has made undersea internet cables more important? (你認為人工智能的發展為何令海底互聯網電纜變得更重要？)
How might faster internet connections between India, Malaysia, and Singapore benefit people living in those countries? (印度、馬來西亞和新加坡之間更快的互聯網連接，如何惠及當地居民？)
lv3: If powerful tech companies like Microsoft control the undersea cables that carry the world's internet, what risks could this create for smaller countries or ordinary people? (如果微軟等大型科技公司控制承載全球互聯網的海底電纜，這對較小的國家或普通市民可能帶來什麼風險？)

Should governments or private companies be in charge of building critical internet infrastructure like undersea cables? What are the advantages and disadvantages of each? (政府還是私人企業應負責建設海底電纜等重要互聯網基礎設施？各有什麼優缺點？)

articles.title: 香港擬為網約車立法 最快今年底開始發牌
articles.summary: 香港政府計劃透過立法方式，正式規管類似Uber的網約車服務。按照初步時間表，當局最快於今年11月開始向網約車平台發出牌照，並在第四季開放供平台及司機申請相關牌照。此舉標誌著香港對網約車行業的態度轉變，由過去監管模糊走向制度化管理。有關安排旨在保障乘客安全，同時令司機在清晰法律框架下合法營運，業界及市民對新制度的細節均表示關注。

lv1: 香港政府計劃對哪種交通服務進行立法規管？
根據政府計劃，最早何時開始發放網約車牌照？
lv2: 為什麼政府需要為網約車服務制定法律？沒有法規會帶來什麼問題？
立法規管網約車對乘客和司機分別有什麼好處？
lv3: 有人認為過度規管會令網約車失去靈活性，削弱競爭力；亦有人認為保障安全比方便更重要。你認為應如何在兩者之間取得平衡？
傳統的士業界和網約車平台在香港長期存在競爭。政府立法後，這兩個行業應如何共存？你有什麼建議？

articles.title: 美國建國250年國慶遇極端天氣 酷熱逾41度迫停慶典
articles.summary: 美國於7月4日慶祝建國250周年，首都華盛頓舉行大型慶典，惟接連遭遇極端天氣。當日下午體感溫度高達攝氏41.7度，酷熱程度迫使國慶大遊行被逼停止。入夜後情況更趨嚴峻，強烈雷暴及暴風雨急速逼近，閃電距國家廣場只有5公里。美國特勤局與警方隨即宣布緊急疏散廣場上的大批市民，確保人身安全。今次事件再次引起各界關注極端天氣對大型公眾活動的威脅。

lv1: 美國國慶慶典在哪個城市舉行？
當天下午的體感溫度高達多少攝氏度？
lv2: 為什麼極端高溫和雷暴天氣會對大型公眾活動構成危險？
特勤局和警方在雷暴逼近時採取了什麼行動？這樣做的原因是什麼？
lv3: 極端天氣事件近年在全球各地愈來愈頻繁，你認為這與氣候變化有關嗎？政府和市民各自應承擔什麼責任？
大型公眾活動（如國慶慶典）應否因天氣預報不佳而提前取消，還是應該保留並加強安全措施？請從不同角度分析。
